narrative:
Olmsted Falls-03-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,302 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.8 percentage points.
